hmong.exponential_recursion_explodes_after_r: Exponential recursion tawg yuav luag tom qab n twg los xij. Nws tsoo phab ntsa qhov twg tiag?
hmong.for_very_small_n_sometimes_o_n_beats_o: Rau n me heev, qee zaus O(n²) yeej O(n log n). Vim li cas?
hmong.i_can_explain_why_this_combination_of_: Kuv piav tau vim li cas qhov kev sib xyaw ntawm n, depth, data structure, thiab recursion no thiaj poob rau ntawm no.

hmong.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis qhia, tsis muaj answer key. Cov operation count yog cov kev kwv yees rau kev kawm thiab piv txwv uas xav tias ~1 GHz effective throughput; qhov performance tiag nyob ntawm cache, branch prediction, JIT, thiab cov constant ua ntej lub Big-O term.

hmong.move_forward_turn_pen_down_a_few_primi: Mus tom ntej, tig, tso cwj mem: ob peb lub command yooj yim → fractal, spiral, polygon. Seymour Papert phau ntawv Mindstorms (1980) qhia tias cov menyuam tuaj yeem tsim lub tswv yim lej los ntawm qhia vaub kib, tsis yog rov qab.

hmong.sequencing_conditionals_loops_function: Sequencing → conditional → loop → function, qhwv rau hauv ib lub maze uas koj pom tau. Cuab Karel the Robot (Stanford 1981) thiab code.org puzzle niaj hnub no. Cov error ho ua spatial: «tsoo phab ntsa».

hmong.forward_50_right_90_backward_30_repeat:
forward(50)
right(90)
backward(30)

repeat(4, function() {
  forward(100)
  right(90)
})
hmong.commands_forward_n_backward_n_right_de: Command: forward(n) backward(n) right(deg) left(deg) penUp() penDown() setColor("#hex") setWidth(n) circle(r) goto(x,y) home() arc(angle,radius) stamp() playNote(freq,dur). Variable: setVar("name",value) changeVar("name",delta) random("name",min,max) — siv ib qho variable nrog $ (xws li forward($name)). Loop thiab logic siv curly braces: repeat(n){ ... }  while (x < 450){ ... }  if (x > 250){ ... } else { ... }. Function: function myShape(){ ... } ces hu nws nrog myShape(). Condition piv x, y, angle los $var siv > < >= <= == != .
